asset_policy.near_field_species: South-Fork-curated project-owned or CC0 meshes only
asset_policy.terrain_detail: project-owned procedural textures and CC0 physical materials

far_field.authority: USGS 3DEP and USDA NAIP where available; deterministic corridor underlay conditioning and uncovered geography are procedural game infill

presentation.terrain: NAIP-conditioned macro colour plus deterministic PBR surface response

unreal_import.far_field_representation: source-backed regular-grid static-mesh patches forming a deterministic lowered underlay beneath the detailed channel
unreal_import.terrain_representation: curved Nanite static-mesh tiles sharing M2 collision height
